title: La boîte
overview: Five childhood friends, who live in a small provincial town, were excluded from the only nightclub in the region. With nothing else to do they plan to open a competing nightclub in the garage of two of the father of two of them.

trailers.title: LA BOITE de Claude ZIDI (2001) #I've got you
